title: NEW Integrations: Bitbucket & WooCommerce
excerpt:
We’re excited to share with you that we’ve just released two new integrations that we worked on during our integration hackathon!:tada: 
 
Bitbucket gives teams one place to plan projects, collaborate on code, test, and …

posts.author: shelly-monday.com (Shelly Gross)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to share with you that we’ve just released two new integrations that we worked on during our integration hackathon!


Bitbucket gives teams one place to plan projects, collaborate on code, test, and deploy. With our new monday.com and Bitbucket integration, you can track your deploys in one place, never miss a release or have to hunt down a feature owner again!

To learn more check out this great article

WooCommerce is an e-commerce platform for online stores and retail point-of-sale systems. Now, with our WooCommerce integration, you can get a high-level view of your store and automatically track your products, inventory, and orders all in one place.

To learn more check out this great article

Stay tuned for more exciting news!!

posts.author: agranville (Andre Granville)
posts.cookedHtml: Cool! I have been waiting for the Bitbucket integration. I will check it out right away and post my comments on it. Great work!

posts.author: lpd123 (Leila)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up my WooCommerce + Monday. Com API keys but when I go to add “when an order is created, create a new item and sync …” it gives me an error message of “couldn’t update automation”.
